notes: Single-episode narrative (NOT 2-episode omnibus). Title bar stays constant throughout: line1=笑える迷言集, line2=これは癒しだろ！. The story is one continuous narrative about a man encountering cute/heartwarming moments while shopping. No episode transition or flash at ~16s - just a '数日後' text transition at f022 (~22s). Background emotion colors and effects vary per scene.
